## Research Complete — Royce Pack Private Limited

**Risk: 3/5 — MONITOR**

### Workstream Summary

| WS | Workstream | Finding | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| **1A** | Entity Verification | CIN U74999DL2020PTC362678 confirmed. Active, ROC Delhi. Incorporated 11 Mar 2020. Revenue ₹25–50 Cr. Operational base Ghaziabad (UP). | ✅ |
| **2A** | Key Individual Verification | Piyush Tantia (DIN 02300471) — 5 active companies, 17 years governance. Shubham Tantia (DIN 10548721) — recent appointment Mar 2024. No PEP, no adverse media, no court records. | ✅ |
| **2B** | Ownership Chain | 100% family-owned (Tantia family). Sushil Kumar Tantia (patriarch, DIN 00973670) → Piyush Tantia → Shubham Tantia. No offshore structures. | ✅ |
| **3A** | Sanctions Screening | **CLEAR (OSINT)** — No OFAC/EU/UN/UK hits. OpenSanctions: no results. ⚠️ Recommend browser-based OFAC SSAN confirmation. | ✅ OSINT |
| **4A** | Litigation | **None found** — IndianKanoon: no results for company or directors. No NCLT/SEBI/MCA enforcement. | ✅ |

| **6** | PEP Check | **CLEAR** — All principals are private-sector entrepreneurs with no government/political affiliations. | ✅ |
| **7** | Trade & Sanctions Adjacency | **Low** — Products are standard commercial packaging materials. No dual-use, no sanctioned-country exposure. | ✅ |
| **8A** | Risk Assessment | **MONITOR** — Primary concern is financial health, not compliance. | ✅ |

### 🔴 Primary Risk: Financial Distress (Score 5/5)

The single most important finding:

| Metric | FY2024 | Verdict |
|---|---|---|
| Revenue growth | **−33.56%** | Sharp contraction |
| EBITDA growth | **−125.74%** | Turned deeply negative |
| Net profit growth | **−397.86%** | Severe loss |
| Gross margin | **−2.62%** | Selling below cost |
| **Debt-to-Equity** | **41.51** | ⚠️ Extreme leverage |
| Registered charges | **None** | Unexplained given D/E |

The company had a remarkable FY2022 boom (revenue +211%, EBITDA +1,101%) followed by a hard reversal — classic over-leverage after a demand surge. With D/E of 41.51 against only ₹10 lakh paid-up equity, the company's solvency depends entirely on borrowed funds. Combined with current LDPE/PP price spikes (+70% from Hormuz crisis), input cost pressure on packaging converters is severe right now.

### Key Corporate Facts

- **5 affiliated entities**, all at same address: Flat 507/72 Laxmi Bhawan, Nehru Place
- Tantia family group spans packaging (Royce Pack), IT (SAT System), agro (Rover Commodities), construction (U-Turn), plus two freshly incorporated 2025 entities (Paavni Buildwell, K2 Krishi Udyog — industry "Unknown")
- Operational GST in Ghaziabad (UP) — registered in Delhi — address discrepancy consistent with manufacturing suburb vs. registered office
